help.agent.additional_prompt: Texto adicional sempre anexado ao final do prompt do sistema.
help.agent.allow_filesystem_write: Quando desabilitado, apenas operações de leitura são permitidas.
help.agent.allow_mcp: ⚠️ Permite ao agente conectar-se a servidores MCP externos.
help.agent.allow_network_requests: Quando desabilitado, bloqueia todas as chamadas api_request.
help.agent.allow_python: Quando desabilitado, bloqueia execute_python, execute_skill e save_tool.
help.agent.allow_self_update: Quando desabilitado, o agente não pode executar manage_updates.
help.agent.allow_shell: Quando desabilitado, o agente bloqueia todas as chamadas execute_shell.
help.agent.allow_web_scraper: Verouderd — gebruik tools.web_scraper.enabled in de sectie "Tools & Services" in plaats hiervan.
help.agent.context_window: Tamanho da janela de contexto em tokens. 0 = auto-detectar.
help.agent.core_memory_cap_mode: Gedrag wanneer de limiet is bereikt: "soft" voegt de invoer toe en retourneert een waarschuwing, "hard" weigert nieuwe invoer. Standaard: soft.
help.agent.debug_mode: Habilita modo de depuração com mensagens de erro detalhadas.
help.agent.memory_compression_char_limit: Limite de caracteres para compressão de memória.
help.agent.personality_engine: Schakelt de personality engine in met stemming en micro-traits. Wordt automatisch ingeschakeld wanneer Personality Engine V2 actief is.
help.agent.personality_engine_v2: Schakelt de geavanceerde V2-engine in met asynchrone LLM stemminganalyse. Schakelt automatisch V1 ook in (vereiste afhankelijkheid).
help.agent.show_tool_results: Mostra resultados das ferramentas no chat.
help.agent.step_delay_seconds: Atraso entre chamadas de ferramenta em segundos.
help.agent.sudo_enabled: Habilita execute_sudo. A senha sudo deve estar no vault.
help.agent.system_prompt_token_budget: Maximaal aantal tokens voor de systeemprompt. 0 = onbeperkt.
help.agent.user_profiling: Schakelt automatisch gebruikersprofiel in: de agent detecteert voorkeuren en gewoonten uit de chat en slaat ze op (vereist Personality Engine V2).
help.agent.user_profiling_threshold: Minimale zekerheid (aantal bevestigingen) voordat een profielattribuut in de systeemprompt wordt geïnjecteerd. Standaard: 2.
help.agent.workflow_feedback: Schakelt occasionele statusupdates in tijdens lange workflows (bijv. "Een ogenblik geduld...").
help.budget.reset_hour: Hour of the day (0-23) when the daily budget resets.
help.email_accounts.name: Display name of the email account.
help.github.owner: GitHub username or organization used as the default owner for API calls.
help.homepage.enabled: Ativa a ferramenta de desenvolvimento web baseada em Docker. A integração Docker deve estar ativa.
help.homepage.allow_deploy: Quando ativado, o agente pode implantar sites num servidor remoto via SFTP/SCP.
help.homepage.allow_container_management: Quando ativado, o agente pode iniciar, parar, reconstruir e destruir o container de desenvolvimento.
help.homepage.deploy_host: Nome do host ou IP do servidor web remoto para implantação.
help.homepage.deploy_port: Porta SSH do servidor remoto. Padrão: 22.
help.homepage.deploy_user: Nome de utilizador SSH para ligação ao servidor de implantação.
help.homepage.deploy_path: Caminho absoluto no servidor remoto onde os ficheiros do site serão carregados (ex. /var/www/html).
help.homepage.deploy_method: Método de transferência: SFTP (padrão) ou SCP.
help.homepage.webserver_enabled: Inicia um servidor web Caddy local no Docker para pré-visualizar sites. Suporta HTTPS automático com um domínio.
help.homepage.webserver_port: Porta para o servidor web Caddy local. Padrão: 8080.
help.homepage.webserver_domain: Domínio opcional para HTTPS automático via Let's Encrypt.
help.homepage.webserver_internal_only: Quando ativado, o contêner Caddy se vincula apenas a 127.0.0.1 (localhost). O servidor web só é acessível localmente, não de redes externas.
help.homepage.workspace_path: Diretório local para projetos web, montado no container Docker.
help.llm.structured_outputs: ⚠️ Habilita Structured Outputs para chamadas de ferramenta.
help.llm.use_native_functions: ⚠️ Usa function calling nativo da LLM.
help.maintenance.time: Time for the daily maintenance run (HH:MM format).
help.meshcentral.readonly: Read-only mode for MeshCentral. Allows only read operations (list groups/devices) and blocks changes like wake, power actions, or command execution.
help.mqtt.qos: Default Quality of Service level: 0 = at most once, 1 = at least once, 2 = exactly once.
help.mqtt.topics: Comma-separated list of topics to subscribe to on startup (e.g. 'home/#, sensors/temperature').
help.notifications.ntfy.topic: ntfy topic name for this AuraGo instance.
help.proxmox.insecure: Disable TLS certificate verification. Enable for self-signed certificates.
help.proxmox.node: Default node name, e.g. 'pve'. Used when no node is specified.
help.rocketchat.alias: Display name of the bot in Rocket.Chat. Default: 'AuraGo'.
help.rocketchat.channel: Default channel to listen on, e.g. 'general'.
help.sandbox.auto_install: Automatically install the llm-sandbox Python package (with MCP extras) on startup. Installs 'llm-sandbox[mcp-docker]' or 'llm-sandbox[mcp-podman]' depending on the backend. Requires a working Python/pip environment.
help.sandbox.backend: Container backend: 'docker' (default) or 'podman'. Docker must be installed and reachable.
help.sandbox.enabled: Habilita sandbox para execução segura de código.
help.sandbox.keep_alive: Keeps the sandbox MCP server running between calls instead of restarting it each time.
help.sandbox.pool_size: Number of pre-warmed containers in the pool (0 = no pooling). Higher values speed up execution but use more resources.
help.server.host: Endereço IP do servidor. "127.0.0.1" = apenas local.
help.server.max_body_bytes: Tamanho máximo do corpo HTTP em bytes.
help.server.https.enabled: Enables HTTPS via Let's Encrypt. AuraGo will automatically obtain and renew a certificate for your domain. HTTP (port 80) from external sources is redirected to HTTPS. Localhost remains accessible via HTTP.
help.server.https.domain: Public domain name (e.g. aurago.mydomain.com). Both port 80 and 443 must be forwarded to AuraGo for Let's Encrypt to work.
help.server.https.email: Contact email for Let's Encrypt. Used for certificate expiry warnings. Not publicly displayed.
help.server.port: Porta para servidor web e API REST.
help.tools.inventory.enabled: Schakelt apparaatinventarisatievragen in. Staat de agent toe om geregistreerde apparaten op te vragen.
help.tools.knowledge_graph.enabled: Habilita ferramenta do grafo de conhecimento.
help.tools.knowledge_graph.read_only: Quando habilitado, só pode pesquisar o grafo.
help.tools.memory.read_only: Quando habilitado, o agente só pode ler memórias.
help.tools.missions.read_only: Quando habilitado, o agente só pode visualizar missões.
help.tools.scheduler.read_only: Quando habilitado, o agente só pode visualizar jobs.
help.tools.secrets_vault.enabled: Habilita ferramenta do cofre de segredos.
help.tools.secrets_vault.read_only: Quando habilitado, o agente só pode ler segredos.
help.github.token: Token de acesso pessoal (PAT) para a API GitHub. Crie um em https://github.com/settings/tokens com os escopos necessários (repo, problemas, etc.). Armazenado criptografado no cofre.
help.ai_gateway.account_id: Your Cloudflare Account ID. Found in the Cloudflare dashboard under Workers & Pages.
help.ai_gateway.enabled: Enable Cloudflare AI Gateway to proxy all LLM API requests. Provides caching, rate-limiting, logging, and analytics. Local providers (Ollama) are excluded.
help.ai_gateway.gateway_id: The name or slug of your AI Gateway instance in Cloudflare.
help.mcp_server.allowed_tools: List of tool names exposed via MCP. Leave empty to expose all currently enabled tools.
help.mcp_server.enabled: Enable the built-in MCP server to expose AuraGo tools for external AI agents via Streamable HTTP.
help.mcp_server.require_auth: When enabled, MCP clients must authenticate with a Bearer token or valid session cookie.
help.providers.account_id: Cloudflare Account ID for Workers AI providers. Required when using the workers-ai provider type.
